headline: Up 33% From Its 52-Week Low: 1 Glaring Red Flag That Makes Altria Stock a Dangerous Buy at $73
summary: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) at $73.13 looks like a name to hold rather than add to. The yield is too rich to abandon, but the entry point is too high to fund with fresh capital while the U.S. consumer wobbles. Altria sells Marlboro, Black & Mild cigars, Copenhagen and Skoal smokeless tobacco, on! nicotine pouches, and ...
